reviews.review_description: Immersion app with motion, music and commentary in beautiful areas of northern Spain - 360 degrees of viewing allows you target areas to visit - nice app to use especially if you are thinking of visiting in person

For a paid app, this immersive experience is pretty blurry. I wasn’t expecting it to be that bad to be honest…

There’s a lot of free content on Meta TV that’s a lot higher definition than this. ￼The menu is a too high so you have to arch your head up to click and view options/locations. Once you open the app, it just continues to talk, which gets quite annoying! It doesn’t stop. The location icons are way too small making it close to impossible to click unless you’re really focused. Okay app to show some friends, but that’s about it.

developer_response.body: Hi! All the problems you addressed are already solved in your app. To stop the narratives, you just have to click the A button, or on the map, there is a button for it as well. Same applies to the music. you can turn it off, if you want to just listen to the nature sounds. On the map you do not have to click on the locations, you just press the joystick forward to go thru all the locations, or turn on autoplay. Then you will stay about 25 seconds on each viewpoint. The resolution is limited to the headset capabilities. You can not use a higher resolution as I am using with a 360 3D (stereoscopic) video. If you saw sharper ones, those were only 180 degrees, or photos. It is really a technical issue, I could go up to 8K, but the headset would not play it. That is why it is in 5.7K. Based on my answer, please reconsider your review, there is nothing I can do about it. The points on the map are small, as otherwise, there would not fit in the right geographic location.. thank you

reviews.review_description: This is an immersion app, basically done in an enhanced google maps style but with motion and all in picturesque areas of North Spain, with both music and running commentary of things to see in the 360 viewing area.  Very intuitive and easy to move around and a handy map in the menu where you can target an area to visit.  I can see lots more locations being added and a handy tool for those wishing to visit these areas.  Well done Dev.

This is a very nice experience.

A collection of 3d 360 videos from various locations around southern Spain.
Nice music and narrative for each location.

Each location really draws you in with the immersion, sounds and information.

Very nice detailed and clear videos recorded via a 360 camera.

You can turn off the music or narration. And even skip through each area for those that are afraid of heights ect…

I felt myself wanting to view each location video and look in awe at the beautiful and amazing locations… some even make you feel like you are actually there!
I love this app. I love to travel and this is as close to being there without physically being there!

developer_response.body: Thank you! I am glad you have liked the experience! Tomorrow (19.4.25) my other 2 apps- Visit Madeira and Visit Faroe Islands go on sale. You can try them out, if you liked Spain, you wont be disappointed from them either ;)
